root.sql:
SELECT current_date , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no) as member_name , trim(pka_com_function.fp_get_group_name(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no))||' ('|| trim(sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no)||')' as member_group_no , trim(sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_name)||' ('|| trim(sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping)||')' as member_group_keeping
, (select coalesce( sum( (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount END) ) , 0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and principal_balance - pending_amount > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115110' and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type not in ('02') ) as loan_emer
, (select coalesce( sum( (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount END) ) , 0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and principal_balance - pending_amount > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115120' ) as loan_norm
, (select coalesce( sum( (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount END) ) , 0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and principal_balance - pending_amount > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115130' ) as loan_spec
, (select coalesce( sum( (CASE sc_lon_m_loan_card.drop_payment_status WHEN '1' THEN 0 ELSE sc_lon_m_contract.period_payment_amount END) ) , 0 ) from sc_lon_m_loan_card , sc_lon_m_contract , sc_lon_m_rule where 1=1 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_contract_no = sc_lon_m_contract.loan_contract_no and sc_lon_m_rule.loan_type = sc_lon_m_loan_card.loan_type and principal_balance - pending_amount > 0 and sc_lon_m_loan_card.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no and sc_lon_m_rule.account_id = '115140' ) as loan_krongkarn
, coalesce((select (sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = (select max(receive_year) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = (select max(receive_month) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where receive_year = (select max(receive_year) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ) ) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = 'MS00' ),0)as share_monthly
, coalesce((select (sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.money_amount) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.membership_no = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_year = (select max(receive_year) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.receive_month = (select max(receive_month) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det where receive_year = (select max(receive_year) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det ) ) and sc_kep_t_monthly_receive_det.keeping_type_code = 'MD50' ),0)as dep_amount FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_kep_t_monthly_receive , sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group WHERE sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.membership_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no AND sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_year = (select max(receive_year) from sc_kep_t_monthly_receive ) AND (CASE sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month WHEN extract(month from current_date) THEN sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month ELSE extract(month from current_date)-1 END) = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.receive_month AND sc_fin_ucf_keeping_group.member_group_keeping = sc_kep_t_monthly_receive.agent_no AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no --AND sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.group_position = '06' --AND sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = '048935' /*WHERE*/ ORDER BY sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no
